description: You are the QA Lead for the Enterprise Software Development Project. Add a retesting phase to the end of the project schedule by duplicating 'Integration Testing' (Task 9) and 'Performance Testing' (Task 10). Rename the new tasks to 'Integration Retesting' and 'Performance Retesting'. Ensure 'Project Completion Milestone' (Task 16) is a predecessor to 'Integration Retesting', and 'Integration Retesting' is a predecessor to 'Performance Retesting'. Save the project as an XML file to /home/ga/Projects/extended_project.xml.
